title: Old School Wool
description: Bring back the old school way of getting wool by punching sheep!
body:
# **Old School Wool**  
A lightweight Minecraft 1.7-style mod that restores the old wool-gathering method. No shears required. Simply punch a sheep and it drops wool just like the good ol' days.

## Features

- Punching sheep drops 1-3 wool

## Installation

1. Make sure you have Fabric Loader and Fabric API installed for Minecraft 1.21.5.
2. Place the download into your `mods` folder.
3. Launch Minecraft.

## Usage

- Punch a sheep and watch the wool fly off!

---

Enjoy your nostalgic shearing!
